category_sources: Official duplicity site describes encrypted bandwidth-efficient backup using the rsync algorithm.
source_facts.description says duplicity is bandwidth-efficient encrypted backup.
display_name_sources: Official duplicity site and GitLab project use the name duplicity.
docs_sources: Official duplicity documentation page links the stable man page and README for release documentation.
repo_sources: Official duplicity site identifies the GitLab project as duplicity's project and git repository.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitLab project.
tags_sources: Official duplicity site describes encrypted tar-format volumes, remote/local file servers, and supported storage backends.
